testcase.name: AllyTest
testcase.failure:
java.lang.AssertionError: Found 9 accessibility violations: 1) ARIA role must be appropriate for the element: https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/3.1/aria-allowed-role?application=axeAPI a) [".team-carousel2 > .owl-nav.disabled > .owl-prev[role=\"presentation\"][type=\"button\"]"] Fix any of the following: role presentation is not allowed for given element
b) [".team-carousel2 > .owl-nav.disabled > .owl-next[role=\"presentation\"][type=\"button\"]"] Fix any of the following: role presentation is not allowed for given element
c) [".testimonials-slider-3 > .owl-nav.disabled > .owl-prev[role=\"presentation\"][type=\"button\"]"] Fix any of the following: role presentation is not allowed for given element
d) [".testimonials-slider-3 > .owl-nav.disabled > .owl-next[role=\"presentation\"][type=\"button\"]"] Fix any of the following: role presentation is not allowed for given element
2) Buttons must have discernible text: https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/3.1/button-name?application=axeAPI a) ["button[onclick=\"changeSlide\\(-1\\)\"]"] Fix all of the following: Element is in tab order and does not have accessible text
Fix any of the following: Element has a value attribute and the value attribute is empty Element has no value attribute or the value attribute is empty Element does not have inner text that is visible to screen readers aria-label attribute does not exist or is empty aria-labelledby attribute does not exist, references elements that do not exist or references elements that are empty Element's default semantics were not overridden with role="presentation" Element's default semantics were not overridden with role="none" Element has no title attribute or the title attribute is empty
b) ["button[onclick=\"changeSlide\\(1\\)\"]"] Fix all of the following: Element is in tab order and does not have accessible text
Fix any of the following: Element has a value attribute and the value attribute is empty Element has no value attribute or the value attribute is empty Element does not have inner text that is visible to screen readers aria-label attribute does not exist or is empty aria-labelledby attribute does not exist, references elements that do not exist or references elements that are empty Element's default semantics were not overridden with role="presentation" Element's default semantics were not overridden with role="none" Element has no title attribute or the title attribute is empty
3) Elements must have sufficient color contrast: https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/3.1/color-contrast?application=axeAPI a) ["strong"] Fix any of the following: Element has insufficient color contrast of 4.25 (foreground color: #f3170f, background color: #ffffff, font size: 13.5pt, font weight: bold). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1
b) [".irctc-service-card:nth-child(1) > .card-details > .explore-link[target=\"_blank\"]"] Fix any of the following: Element has insufficient color contrast of 2.93 (foreground color: #f37021, background color: #ffffff, font size: 11.3pt, font weight: bold). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1
c) ["a[href$=\"www.bus.irctc.co.in\"]"] Fix any of the following: Element has insufficient color contrast of 2.93 (foreground color: #f37021, background color: #ffffff, font size: 11.3pt, font weight: bold). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1
d) [".title"] Fix any of the following: Element has insufficient color contrast of 2.91 (foreground color: #ff0000, background color: #c3e2e4, font size: 18.8pt, font weight: bold). Expected contrast ratio of 3:1
e) [".hl-rightPanel-tab[data-name=\"userInfo1\"][data-type=\"bar\"] > em"] Fix any of the following: Element has insufficient color contrast of 2.4 (foreground color: #ffffff, background color: #6eb2b7, font size: 9.0pt, font weight: bold). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1
f) [".hl-rightPanel-tab[data-name=\"userInfo2\"][data-type=\"bar\"] > em"] Fix any of the following: Element has insufficient color contrast of 2.4 (foreground color: #ffffff, background color: #6eb2b7, font size: 9.0pt, font weight: bold). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1
g) [".hl-rightPanel-tab[data-name=\"userInfo3\"][data-type=\"bar\"] > em"] Fix any of the following: Element has insufficient color contrast of 2.4 (foreground color: #ffffff, background color: #6eb2b7, font size: 9.0pt, font weight: bold). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1
h) [".hl-rightPanel-tab[data-name=\"userInfo4\"][data-type=\"bar\"] > em"] Fix any of the following: Element has insufficient color contrast of 2.4 (foreground color: #ffffff, background color: #6eb2b7, font size: 9.0pt, font weight: bold). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1
i) [".hl-rightPanel-tab[data-name=\"userInfo5\"][data-type=\"bar\"] > em"] Fix any of the following: Element has insufficient color contrast of 2.4 (foreground color: #ffffff, background color: #6eb2b7, font size: 9.0pt, font weight: bold). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1
4) Headings must not be empty: https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/3.1/empty-heading?application=axeAPI a) [".logo-container > h6"] Fix any of the following: Element does not have text that is visible to screen readers
5) Heading levels should only increase by one: https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/3.1/heading-order?application=axeAPI a) [".irctc-service-card:nth-child(1) > .card-details > h5"] Fix any of the following: Heading order invalid
b) [".logo-container > h6"] Fix any of the following: Heading order invalid
6) Images must have alternate text: https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/3.1/image-alt?application=axeAPI a) [":root"] Fix any of the following: Element does not have an alt attribute aria-label attribute does not exist or is empty aria-labelledby attribute does not exist, references elements that do not exist or references elements that are empty Element has no title attribute or the title attribute is empty Element's default semantics were not overridden with role="presentation" Element's default semantics were not overridden with role="none"
b) [":root"] Fix any of the following: Element does not have an alt attribute aria-label attribute does not exist or is empty aria-labelledby attribute does not exist, references elements that do not exist or references elements that are empty Element has no title attribute or the title attribute is empty Element's default semantics were not overridden with role="presentation" Element's default semantics were not overridden with role="none"
c) ["img[src$=\"hits3.png\"]"] Fix any of the following: Element does not have an alt attribute aria-label attribute does not exist or is empty aria-labelledby attribute does not exist, references elements that do not exist or references elements that are empty Element has no title attribute or the title attribute is empty Element's default semantics were not overridden with role="presentation" Element's default semantics were not overridden with role="none"
7) Links must have discernible text: https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/3.1/link-name?application=axeAPI a) [".logo3"] Fix all of the following: Element is in tab order and does not have accessible text
Fix any of the following: Element does not have text that is visible to screen readers aria-label attribute does not exist or is empty aria-labelledby attribute does not exist, references elements that do not exist or references elements that are empty Element's default semantics were not overridden with role="presentation" Element's default semantics were not overridden with role="none"
b) [".slider3.swiper-slide-duplicate[data-swiper-slide-index=\"\\33 \"] > a[href$=\"travel-tourism.php\"]"] Fix all of the following: Element is in tab order and does not have accessible text
Fix any of the following: Element does not have text that is visible to screen readers aria-label attribute does not exist or is empty aria-labelledby attribute does not exist, references elements that do not exist or references elements that are empty Element's default semantics were not overridden with role="presentation" Element's default semantics were not overridden with role="none"
c) [".swiper-slide-prev > .container > .slider-content > .slider-right > .qr-code > a[href$=\"catering-services.php\"]"] Fix all of the following: Element is in tab order and does not have accessible text
Fix any of the following: Element does not have text that is visible to screen readers aria-label attribute does not exist or is empty aria-labelledby attribute does not exist, references elements that do not exist or references elements that are empty Element's default semantics were not overridden with role="presentation" Element's default semantics were not overridden with role="none"
d) [".swiper-slide-prev > .container > .slider-content > .slider-right > .store-area > a[target=\"_blank\"]:nth-child(1)"] Fix all of the following: Element is in tab order and does not have accessible text
Fix any of the following: Element does not have text that is visible to screen readers aria-label attribute does not exist or is empty aria-labelledby attribute does not exist, references elements that do not exist or references elements that are empty Element's default semantics were not overridden with role="presentation" Element's default semantics were not overridden with role="none"

Fix any of the following: Element does not have text that is visible to screen readers aria-label attribute does not exist or is empty aria-labelledby attribute does not exist, references elements that do not exist or references elements that are empty Element's default semantics were not overridden with role="presentation" Element's default semantics were not overridden with role="none"
f) [".swiper-slide-prev > a[href$=\"catering-services.php\"]:nth-child(2)"] Fix all of the following: Element is in tab order and does not have accessible text
Fix any of the following: Element does not have text that is visible to screen readers aria-label attribute does not exist or is empty aria-labelledby attribute does not exist, references elements that do not exist or references elements that are empty Element's default semantics were not overridden with role="presentation" Element's default semantics were not overridden with role="none"

Fix any of the following: Element does not have text that is visible to screen readers aria-label attribute does not exist or is empty aria-labelledby attribute does not exist, references elements that do not exist or references elements that are empty Element's default semantics were not overridden with role="presentation" Element's default semantics were not overridden with role="none"
h) [".slider3.swiper-slide[data-swiper-slide-index=\"\\33 \"]:nth-child(5) > a[href$=\"travel-tourism.php\"]"] Fix all of the following: Element is in tab order and does not have accessible text
Fix any of the following: Element does not have text that is visible to screen readers aria-label attribute does not exist or is empty aria-labelledby attribute does not exist, references elements that do not exist or references elements that are empty Element's default semantics were not overridden with role="presentation" Element's default semantics were not overridden with role="none"
i) [".swiper-slide-duplicate-prev > .container > .slider-content > .slider-right > .qr-code > a[href$=\"catering-services.php\"]"] Fix all of the following: Element is in tab order and does not have accessible text

8) <marquee> elements are deprecated and must not be used: https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/3.1/marquee?application=axeAPI a) ["marquee"] Fix all of the following: Element is visible
9) All page content must be contained by landmarks: https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/3.1/region?application=axeAPI a) ["html"] Fix any of the following: Some page content is not contained by landmarks
at AccessibilityTests.AllyTest.AllyTest(AllyTest.java:45) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DirectMethodHandleAccessor.invoke(DirectMethodHandleAccessor.java:103) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:580) at org.testng.internal.invokers.MethodInvocationHelper.invokeMethod(MethodInvocationHelper.java:141) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeMethod(TestInvoker.java:686) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeTestMethod(TestInvoker.java:230) at org.testng.internal.invokers.MethodRunner.runInSequence(MethodRunner.java:63) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker$MethodInvocationAgent.invoke(TestInvoker.java:992) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeTestMethods(TestInvoker.java:203) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestMethodWorker.invokeTestMethods(TestMethodWorker.java:154) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestMethodWorker.run(TestMethodWorker.java:134) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) at org.testng.TestRunner.privateRun(TestRunner.java:739) at org.testng.TestRunner.run(TestRunner.java:614) at org.testng.SuiteRunner.runTest(SuiteRunner.java:421) at org.testng.SuiteRunner.runSequentially(SuiteRunner.java:413) at org.testng.SuiteRunner.privateRun(SuiteRunner.java:373) at org.testng.SuiteRunner.run(SuiteRunner.java:312) at org.testng.SuiteRunnerWorker.runSuite(SuiteRunnerWorker.java:52) at org.testng.SuiteRunnerWorker.run(SuiteRunnerWorker.java:95) at org.testng.TestNG.runSuitesSequentially(TestNG.java:1274) at org.testng.TestNG.runSuitesLocally(TestNG.java:1208) at org.testng.TestNG.runSuites(TestNG.java:1112) at org.testng.TestNG.run(TestNG.java:1079) at org.testng.remote.AbstractRemoteTestNG.run(AbstractRemoteTestNG.java:115) at org.testng.remote.RemoteTestNG.initAndRun(RemoteTestNG.java:293) at org.testng.remote.RemoteTestNG.main(RemoteTestNG.java:91)
